title: Day 1：我是谁
sentences: My English is not very good yet.
Hello. My name is Xue Yusheng. I am from China. I live in China. I am learning English. My English is not very good yet.

title: Day 2：我做什么
sentences: I am an embedded software engineer.
I work as an embedded software engineer.
My job is to develop firmware and automation tools.
My name is Xue Yusheng. I am from China. I live in China. I work as an embedded software engineer. My job is to develop firmware and automation tools. I am busy at work.

title: Day 3：我喜欢什么
sentences: I really like learning new tools.
I don't like repeating manual work.
In my free time, I usually read technical articles.
I like it because it is useful and relaxing.
I like embedded software. I really like learning new tools. In my free time, I usually read technical articles. I like it because it is useful and relaxing.

title: Day 4：我为什么学英语
sentences: I want to improve my English.
I want to speak English better.
I need English for reading technical documents.
I want to talk with engineers from other countries.
I know it is hard, but I will try.
I am learning English because I need it for reading technical documents and talking about my work. I want to improve my English. I want to speak English better. I know it is hard, but I will try.

title: Day 5：完整自我介绍
sentences: I work as an embedded software engineer.
In my free time, I like reading technical articles.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Xue Yusheng. I am from China. I work as an embedded software engineer. My job is to develop firmware and automation tools. I have worked on smart fitness equipment, OTA upgrades, and device security. In my free time, I like reading technical articles and learning new tools. I am learning English because I need it for technical documents and work communication. Nice to meet you.

I like embedded software and smart hardware.
I want to improve my English for my work.

I like embedded software because it is practical.
I don't like repeated manual work because it is easy to make mistakes.

title: Day 49：复习和复盘

title: Day 50：自我介绍 + 聊工作
sentences: I work as an embedded software engineer.
My work is busy, but interesting.
I am learning English because I need it for technical documents and work communication.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Xue Yusheng. I work as an embedded software engineer. My work is busy, but interesting. I develop firmware and automation tools. I have experience with MCU firmware, Bootloader, Secure Boot, OTA upgrades, BLE, NB-IoT, and 4G. I am learning English because I need it for technical documents and work communication. Nice to meet you.

sentences: Hello, my name is Xue Yusheng. I am from China. I work as an embedded software engineer. My job is to develop firmware and automation tools. I have worked on smart fitness equipment, OTA upgrades, device security, and communication modules. I am learning English because I need it for technical documents and work communication.
My work is busy, but interesting.
I develop firmware for smart hardware.
I use C, C++, and Python at work.
I have experience with Bootloader, Secure Boot, and OTA upgrades.
